h8934c95bgf68cg46dbg93cfg952f3c34bbcb: Can it be? A githyanki? What a delight!
hf9474932g1f97g4aebg838cg7b097b6c01d1: Do my eyes deceive me? A drow? Here?
hfddf34f1g4e26g4bacga28eg0bed487edf58: Do my eyes deceive me? A duergar? Here?
h8daf7bd1g8c12g4c44ga53dg3d3d080db90f: If I were less educated, I'd presume to ask what you're doing on the Sword Coast.
h5527cb7cg23c2g45fag9946ge3852573c78b: Then for your own sake, your education is fortunate indeed.
ha9dd06ddg3cc6g42e5g9d51g1e5d57c388f8: Indeed! Some merciless kin of yours made sure of that, some years ago.
h12ffa31agfca3g4202g9088g1c0fb7f316f3: Though at present, my curiosity lies elsewhere than the vagaries of the children of Gith.
hdcdaa106g69c1g4b97ga649g55884002fdf8: You were at the gates just now, no? When the goblins came? You saw them up-close?
h2b5ed5d8g1dcag497cg9be1gd7c257c3634c: A few questions, if you please. There's no overstating my interest.
h3c30ef12g9589g406egb43bg927187b8b7d0: How would you describe that particular batch of goblins? Size? Nature? Distinguishing qualities?
h9b5e3e53g8cdcg4485ga7d0g42b7f99b747d: *You search your mind, successfully recalling various details of goblin behaviour.*
hf96108a5gc06bg488ag809dg61cf7f10679e: Common variety goblins, led by a lasher and flanked by booyahgs.
h7f848bceg41c8g4ad3g87aeg384b2ef1bc97: My! A scholar after my own heart. Spent much time among goblins?
he3179702g3788g4d8ag92ddgd63af3c0a28f: The time was spent among books. I'm a student of the page.
hd41798c3gd9a9g4916ga5e5ge2c84295d73d: Aha! I've always preferred experience to the second-hand accounts of lesser men. But to each their own!
h5e02be88g8757g46e2g8a17g8d4a9214fe12: Now I've a few more questions, if you don't mind.
h6db69ae6g500eg4e34g8264ge7774119bb08: And the... dragon they had marching at their rear. Was it of the Brass or Silver variety?
h33daed9dgdbfeg4262g9698g8356e8e2c646: Last question, and you'll be quite free. Did the attackers rally to 'the Absolute' when they fell upon the gates?
hcd1af981g7661g4570g8757gb25e8ec5dc59: Yes - they called out the name like a war cry.
h9075aa4dg66ebg4bfdga210g551c5f66cd9e: They did, didn't they? Oh-ho, curious. Curious indeed.
hbbebad31g8d7bg4d9dg952cgaefc6c5cd242: I don't think so. I was concentrating on not dying.
h1b43138fg8219g4330ga365g7c69965343b0: Really? Well, this does complicate things... but then again... well, nevermind.
h14ebf6a9gb976g4e41ga025g1e54148f5fc1: Yes - they're part of that gods-damned cult.
h9ee32358gcf8dg49f7g819bg8fe1586a2b69: Tell him what happened at Anga Vled.
hcbc14296gf1d4g4aa1g9a80g4b6e914b42a1: I didn't realise. You poor dear.
hc5acbb7eg35b3g4e1bg9e63ge651db6b79bf: What's done is done. But now someone has to answer for it.
hc3086905gf585g42d4gb711gc9ca7db056bf: I couldn't agree more. But my gods, what a harrowing tale.
h484a3295gbe85g4999gabfeg9f3b4b1493f8: Tell me, have you considered setting it to the page? Your story deserves to be heard - I'm certain it'd make quite a splash.
h907f9d3dg5108g48d2g9667g7157a1d10403: My life is just that. Mine.
hbd8090dfg4473g4407gb26cg73d184709bf6: My dear, humanoids are social creatures. None of us belongs to ourselves.
h01b6ffe3g4d5bg4871gb23bg53a2489d97c0: What do you have in mind?
h2fbe74a4gc818g428eg80d1g7c8dc0865ccd: You tell your story. I write it down. After that, we offer it to the public in return for appropriate compensation.
h68eb1100gd769g4b1eg9772g31bb76a20af8: Some good can still come from this tragedy.
hbc8ffc6cg7e2eg4935g8145g0c58aa1c969f: No. I'm not getting rich off my family's blood. And neither are you.
hc4dffe0ag51abg40afg9fd5g901ac5af37f2: There's a great deal more to it than that, my dear, but I can see I've upset you. Let us leave the matter.
hd6737d8fg4fc0g4703gb5c0g64575d9f82d5: If you change your mind, I hope you'll find me again. Until then, I've business amongst the brutes who attacked your home.
h800601ddgc517g47d7ga62bgadcdc827acb3: I've interrogated one - a captive in this very camp. She reports they've abandoned their god Maglubiyet in favour of someone called 'the Absolute.'
h449d151fg1b89g49c6gba97g5144c2dae962: Since their change in allegiance, these goblins are informed by a kind of strategy anathema to their kind.
hb65e6a0cge5d7g43b0ga640g937df8fa295f: I, for one, intend to get to the bottom of it.
h822286fag391dg49f5ga4e6gf62e19a91c03: I'm just preparing to head to their camp as we speak. In fact... if you'll excuse me, I ought not to dawdle.
hf485f239ge240g4290gac34g438654ca60dc: Be careful. Goblins aren't known for mercy.
he7935589g04ceg4ab1g8376gae13a59828df: Never you mind. Who needs mercy when you've a quick tongue? (And an invisibility potion stashed in one's back pocket.)
h87511466gba10g4e99ga027gcd9fe9e71d0a: Wait. About our conversation earlier - why the dragon?
had6e5e23g5b9eg4676g9dc0gd2634fb8c0b3: My friend, every story benefits from a dragon.
hb684d961gd060g430dg98f9gc6058647515d: What brought you to the wilds in the first place?
h69b7c3c9g5124g4da7g86cagcb97ebbe6269: Why, goblins, obviously. Someone ought to chronicle these curious events.
h03d1d9c4g7458g4344ga72ega4922f2f4a0c: I'd heard the master of this place - a druid called Halsin - might be able to point me in the right direction.
hd012e214gdf1eg459dgb39cg3cdcfb090c2c: But! He's been quite captured by them already. Ironic, really.
h283d947eg2739g4b9bg91e1g61f5bf51ccb1: Goblin superstition - not worth the ink and parchment.
h1733cdd1gcb72g4383ga0b3g85d567b73613: Ah, but is superstition all? These goblins are informed by a kind of strategy anathema to their kind.
h5e055db9g31e3g4c4eg930fgf4d662e51caf: Never you mind. I'm on my way to their camp as we speak. I always knew my studies in Ghukliak would come to some use.
ha771e062g9095g4fadg9f86g8aee9be88c17: A scandal? More like a threat.
h10b71e0bg553cg4911g98c9g4216a834c919: Naturally. The implications might be quite serious. Still, there's something quite provocative in the whole scenario.
h868a23d2gd81fg421agbaa9g9c2b92c65dcc: What do you think Maglubiyet makes of this change?
hf38282d4gf864g4e6eg88c2g7c5f287fd105: What a clever little profiteer you are.
hdffc72d0gc3a9g4600g932agf02919b0dc13: A clever-er profiteer would have taken your tale of woe, embellished it, and sold it on his own.
hdde06e9dg3d39g427ag91d5g5faaa5d6127b: Please do. This 'cult,' as you described it, could be very dangerous. Your tale could serve as the clarion call to those who might put a stop to it.
h542ca6c4g1b2dg4710g98dbgd4dc3b0e7b5b: Find me when you're ready to give it a try. Until then, I've business amongst the brutes who attacked your home.
h33989283g59e1g4982gacf9g0d38ec5036c7: I haven't held a quill since my school days.
h1b6a8022ge8a0g4b0cg8abdg8746eaa4fe94: My dear, you're looking at one of the realm's best-regarded scribes. I'd be more than happy to help you set ink to parchment.
hea8146c7g0510g4a3agaafag20abd666ca58: Save your sympathy. I'm not sad - I'm furious.
h655e5fc2g4762g4ac7gbf2cg66edce697193: Understandable. Your tale quite stirs the blood.
hdbf1ba97g97fdg4c49ga837g11ffa7881f7c: Forget it. What are you doing here?
h9be94885g4f62g45f7g80d2g56e82084f24d: The same thing I do everywhere. Seek to know.
h66adf2cagbe79g4d58ga2b0g9cd841d31f90: The goblins in this region are most unusual, you see.
h3c607f13g1e1bg4722gac2eg9024d9336000: There's not much more to tell, I'm afraid.
hf5d55fa5g6280g4c85gb9b8g2f646d32b0a4: Pity. I'm dying for information. These are like no goblins I've ever seen.
h2a806505g72fdg4651gbc6ag40b412d0a3eb: It isn't just goblins. I've seen drow, gnolls, and more, working together.
h64621b6eg336eg410egb1b0g380e3f98a5de: Then again... there's been a drastic shift of late. Among the goblins, least of all.
h2b99df76gb35bg4cfbg879fgc849a6d429bc: Heh - it was brass. No doubt about it.
hcf12a97egc654g477dgb6cbg28ad0b398303: 'Witness... mistook... obvious... Silver... dragon... for... Brass...'
h71d9b26fg8a4eg497fgbc61gc7fe34875c6b: I think there's been a misunderstanding. What do you want, exactly?
hea90e50dg33d9g4203g9484g75c04b14b7cf: The truth, my friend! Not a jot more or less!
hf534d71bgc7b8g43c7ga7f3g1f61c81bf7d9: Are you drunk or merely stupid?
h1d2c5350ga089g4419gb0e5g611f982a0247: 'Witness... declined... to... comment... on... nature... of... dragon...'
h66f930e6g1ffag45a5g8f88g3ebef5ffb291: A Brass or Silver dragon would die a million deaths before allying with goblins.
h811a2318g6506g4ee6g889dg5c7760c2034c: Neither! It was a gold dragon, scales glittering and wings gleaming.
hdbae30cbg85cag47e3gab62g13ab667294eb: Thank heaven you were here to specify, or I might have recorded a boldfaced lie!
h7e57024cg3bb7g4eaegb68dgc2f1dba83205: I'd rather not say. Are we done here?
hf92bd543g2ce1g445ag8c8agd3e58c56a41d: Far be it from me to pry! Now, as you were saying... lasher... booyahg...
hfb7b5ee6gf21eg4586gb16dgebcf36cdd548: I'm not unfamiliar with their kind, certainly.
hffb8ca51g1fbcg403eg9853gbc69940aa932: Shocking little creatures, aren't they. Still, there's quite a bit more to them then most accounts allow.
h11abc560g7060g47f6g99cfg07515d571eda: I myself plan to record the world's most extensive catalogue of their means and habits. A blue ocean of information, I daresay.
h41009e28g8c0dg4b24g8387g10796b7400a2: *You search your mind, but remember nothing useful about goblin social order or behaviour.*
had053394g1b47g44cdgbc9dg67318a0a8f01: They were goblins, same all the others: lowly and vile.
h91c4f78dg8563g4d09g8578gb9e319a62d3e: 'Goblins... struck... fear... and... awe... in... heart... of... wilting... witness...'
ha6a4b093g4dd2g4db6gb998gd234e2e120d4: A myth-weaver. This man has no respect for truth.
h1a5267f4g2d4bg4023gadc1ga59da2167967: 'Goblins... were... of... rare... gem-coloured... hue... and... wielded... magic... blowguns...' Right!
ha36ddb99gc0d6g4c69g8608gec4810d077c4: Goblins? Hardly. They were shapeshifted devas!
h5916cc49g166eg4550g9d06g8085bfc7d97c: Ye gods! Can it be? How terribly... compelling...
h8ae08ff9ge59fg49fcg8236gd045e030214c: And there's no overstating my disinterest. I've no time for questions.
hb76de60bgdf97g40e1g90f9gcb664765de85: I'll make it very quick, hand to heart.
h8f083033g6941g4de9g86e9gb58b7cb0c061: You seem more familiar with githyanki than most around here.
h69b96a20g7040g4401gb0b9g16f557114c82: You're hardly my first, my friend. With a curious mind and a good pair of walking shoes, one makes many an acquaintance.
hd42e0684gebf3g4da7g816dg2c1b558950b8: What I'm doing is none of your concern.
hfab9e754g2b04g47f3g87ffg237e64dd48b0: Naturally. I wouldn't pry, no matter the temptation. It's just...
h6db5463ag4256g4fdag9287gf7dbd647d621: Forgive my surprise. It's rare to find your kind above ground. Rare and intriguing on a day already packed with intrigue!
hcd2a7862gb684g4e1egb413g4204a917b8a4: Pardon me! Must prepare to travel - good day, my friend!
he3fac378g000bg4ac5gafe5g5da948b2b295: To the goblins camped nearby, of course. I've been tracing their doings with great care.
h6d2b5d8agc048g4cd5g9502g72d568998bbe: Whoever this 'Absolute' they're worshipping might be, I'll be the first to write about it.
h67d4340egf756g4545g8729g66adad1d9959: ... I'll tell you, if you'd be so good as to answer a few questions pertaining to the goblins you encountered at the gates.
